lastSummary: Reviewed the 11:01 AM-12:01 PM EDT window and found no new user-facing mission-control/task changes beyond the already logged token-governance work.

Recorded the completed one-hour token audit in today's daily note: the run ended at 11:52 AM EDT and the report attributes 228,539 total session-store tokens in the window mostly to cron traffic, with maintain-workspace-hourly (~47k) plus repeated recover-main-task-closeouts wakes (~14k each) dominating the measured burn.
Reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files again, found no pending shared-important promotions, and refreshed their review stamps before the immediate git auto-sync step.
